heading: Sale of Supreme Court reports
label: 412 Sale of Supreme Court reports
text: The Director of the Government Publishing Office, or other printer designated by the Supreme Court of the United States shall print such additional bound volumes and preliminary prints of such reports as may be required for sale to the public. Such additional copies shall be sold by the Superintendent of Documents, as provided by law.

Amendments1952—Act , permitted Superintendent of Documents to sell reports under same terms as other Government publications.July 10, 1952
